title: Forest bar
description: A lush, vine-themed UI overhaul that replaces the standard hotbar with vibrant greenery and delicate floral details,and more
body:
Forest Bar is a unique resource pack that brings the beauty of nature directly to your HUD. It transforms the standard grey vanilla interface into an organic display crafted from thick, leafy vines.

Key Features:
Vine-Based Hotbar: The item bar is redesigned with organic vine textures instead of solid frames.

Nature Accents: Beautifully woven flowers and leaves give your UI a fresh and "alive" feel.

Lightweight: Only modifies specific GUI files to ensure maximum compatibility and performance.

Perfect for jungle explorations, nature-themed builds, or any player who wants a more organic survival experience.
